name: Feature DoR — Risk & Compliance Extensions (Starter Draft)
description: Placeholder feature-level criteria for Risk & Compliance.
placeholder_note: Starter content. Replace with real Risk & Compliance feature DoR criteria.

criteria.name: Control Owner Named
criteria.description: If the feature implements or modifies a control, the named control owner (within Risk) is documented.
criteria.why: Controls without an owner drift; owners without controls can't catch drift.
criteria.fix: Name the control owner and the control ID it maps to (or attest 'no control modified').
criteria.good_example: Control: RISK-CTRL-082 (delinquency reporting completeness). Owner: [Risk lead]. Or: 'No existing control modified.'
